metadata.text: Compass Rose: guard owns the glowing center; ensemble faces out on Count 120.

showcase_notes.purpose: Demonstrates form tools, section-aware assignment, curved paths, staggered movement, follow-the-leader keyframes, guard choreography, moving props, specialized surfaces, and physical limits.
showcase_notes.audio: No audio is bundled; import any 144 BPM track or use the built-in metronome/timing map.

music_phrases.name: Harbor at Dusk
music_phrases.notes: Controlled opening into the first bloom.

music_phrases.name: Neon Undertow
music_phrases.notes: Staggered waves into continuous conveyor motion.

storyboard.name: Harbor Window
storyboard.production_notes: Introduce every section color; guard frames the block before blooming inward.

storyboard.name: Twin Vortices
storyboard.production_notes: Infinity-inspired twin loops collapse into opposing crowns.

storyboard.name: Neon Track
storyboard.production_notes: Section stagger, moving sails, and continuous follow-the-leader track.

storyboard.name: Compass Rose
storyboard.production_notes: Eight-point star, glowing guard core, final equipment release.

choreography.name: Silk Bloom
choreography.notes: Open low-right to high-left while the star forms.

choreography.name: Rifle Ripple
choreography.notes: Side 1 to Side 2 release over four counts.

choreography.name: Sabre Flash
choreography.notes: Alternating planes through the split crown.

choreography.name: Load the Neon Sails
choreography.notes: Four guard pods establish the carrying handles.

choreography.name: Orbit Body Spiral
choreography.notes: Continuous facing change inside the track.

choreography.name: Compass Rose Release
choreography.notes: Release toward the eight points; catch and face out.
